title: Iconic Poster Cast Remix
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for rebuilding famous movie-poster composition logic with entirely different character casts, while preserving hierarchy, negative space, and proposal-ready campaign impact.

en.title: Iconic Poster Cast Remix
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for rebuilding famous movie-poster composition logic with entirely different character casts, while preserving hierarchy, negative space, and proposal-ready campaign impact.

zh-CN.title: 经典海报构图换角
zh-CN.description: 把大众熟悉的经典电影海报构图换成别的影视、动漫或游戏角色，但仍保留原海报一眼能认出的站位、留白和标题层级。
